calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Niles Rosenquest for Plaintiff Olga Kernycky, Tony Grandberry in pro per

The parties placed a stipulation for judgment on the record as follows: Possession and restitution to the plaintiff. Defendant will vacate the premises located at 257 Schwerin Street, San Francisco, at 5:00 PM on 5/1/2005. Plaintiff will waive back rent if premises vacated. Plaintiff will retain $700 security deposit. Mutual release - parties to bear own costs of suit. If defendant fails to comply plaintiff may with 24 hours notice seek ex-parte judgment for immediate entry and possession and rent. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Joseph Ragazzo, Clerk: Don Feinberg; Reporter Maria Torreano

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
